zone_summary: Patch-merge logic for MLV execution definitions now clears carried-over SelectedMLVs when a definition leaves SelectedOnly, while explicitly preserving SelectedMLVs for CurrentLakehouse cases that still depend on them.

behavioral_changes.summary: When a PATCH resolves an execution definition from SelectedOnly to CurrentLakehouse/All, stale SelectedMLVs are now cleared instead of being preserved from the existing definition.
When a PATCH resolves an execution definition from SelectedOnly to FullLineage, stale SelectedMLVs are now cleared instead of being preserved from the existing definition.

The new clearing logic is intentionally scoped: CurrentLakehouse definitions keep their existing SelectedMLVs on a no-op/non-mode-changing PATCH because CatalogHandler still uses them for recursive ancestor traversal.

grounding_evidence.reason: Contract-bearing comments narrow the fix's scope: only SelectedOnly->non-SelectedOnly transitions should clear, and CurrentLakehouse must retain SelectedMLVs.

grounding_evidence.excerpt:
SelectedMLVs = existing.ExecutionMode == ExecutionMode.SelectedOnly && executionMode != ExecutionMode.SelectedOnly
    ? new List<string>()
    : this.CurrentLakehouseExecutionContext?.SelectedMlvs?.Count > 0
        ? this.CurrentLakehouseExecutionContext.SelectedMlvs
        : existing.SelectedMLVs,
grounding_evidence.reason: This new branch is the behavioral change: it clears SelectedMLVs only when leaving SelectedOnly, and otherwise preserves request-supplied or existing values.
Regression test contract for the CurrentLakehouse/All transition: the expected outcome flipped from preserving SelectedMLVs to clearing them.
New regression test locks the generalized behavior that leaving SelectedOnly for FullLineage must also clear stale SelectedMLVs.
New test guards the counter-case: the fix must not blanket-clear CurrentLakehouse SelectedMLVs on patches that do not change away from that mode.

scenario_sketches.title: SelectedOnly -> CurrentLakehouse/All PATCH clears stale SelectedMLVs
scenario_sketches.rationale: Start with an existing definition in SelectedOnly containing SelectedMLVs, PATCH only CurrentLakehouseExecutionMode=All, and assert the internal model resolves to CurrentLakehouse with an empty SelectedMLVs list so stale CatalogHandler filtering cannot survive the mode switch.

scenario_sketches.title: SelectedOnly -> FullLineage PATCH clears stale SelectedMLVs
scenario_sketches.rationale: Start with an existing definition in SelectedOnly containing SelectedMLVs, PATCH ExtendedLineageExecutionMode=All, and assert the internal model resolves to FullLineage with SelectedMLVs cleared, proving the fix applies to non-SelectedOnly targets beyond CurrentLakehouse.

scenario_sketches.title: No-op CurrentLakehouse PATCH preserves existing SelectedMLVs
scenario_sketches.rationale: Use an existing CurrentLakehouse definition that already has SelectedMLVs, PATCH an unrelated field such as DisplayName, and assert SelectedMLVs are preserved. This guards against over-broad clearing and matches the new contract comment that CurrentLakehouse still relies on SelectedMLVs for recursive ancestor traversal.
